title: EmbedContentRequest
description: Request containing the Content for the model to embed.

taskType.description: The type of task for which the embedding will be used. Not supported by older embedding models.

title.description: An optional title for the text. Only applicable when TaskType is RETRIEVAL_DOCUMENT. Note: Specifying a title for RETRIEVAL_DOCUMENT provides better quality embeddings for retrieval.

outputDimensionality.description: Reduced dimension for the output embedding. If set, excessive values in the output embedding are truncated from the end. Supported by newer models since 2024 only.
